title: GovernanceRejectedPayload
description: A governance command the state machine refused — the exactly-one-outcome twin of CandidateNominated/VoteCast. Rejections flow back to the actor as percepts (M2-8): the same action-awareness loop that teaches gather teaches civics. causationId = the rejected GovernanceRequested's eventId; aggregate = the acting VILLAGER (a rejection may have no valid election to aggregate on). Producer: government-service on government.events.

electionId.description: The election named in the request; null when the request never named a resolvable one.

errorCode.description: Machine-readable cause; the same vocabulary government-service's REST plane uses in problem+json.

message.description: Prescriptive, villager-readable prose (the M2-1 lesson: diagnosis quality IS competence — this string becomes the percept).
